name: Moderna, Inc.
summary: Moderna is a biotechnology company and pioneer in mRNA medicine, focused on developing vaccines and therapeutics across infectious disease, oncology, and rare disease. The company currently markets three commercial products: Spikevax and mNEXSPIKE (COVID-19 vaccines) and mRESVIA (RSV vaccine). In 2025, Moderna generated $1.9 billion in total revenue, primarily from COVID vaccine sales, while advancing a broader pipeline including individualized cancer therapies.

products.name: Spikevax
products.description: Moderna's COVID-19 mRNA vaccine, one of its primary commercial products.

products.name: mNEXSPIKE
products.description: Moderna's COVID-19 vaccine launched commercially in Q3 2025, now leading product in U.S. retail channel.

products.name: mRESVIA
products.description: Moderna's mRNA-based vaccine against respiratory syncytial virus (RSV).

products.name: intismeran autogene (mRNA-4157)
products.description: Individualized mRNA-based neoantigen therapy for cancer, uniquely manufactured per patient, in Phase 2/3 trials.

products.name: mRNA-4359
products.description: Oncology pipeline candidate being advanced by Moderna.

partnerships.description: Co-developing intismeran autogene (mRNA-4157) in combination with pembrolizumab (KEYTRUDA) across multiple tumor types in Phase 2 and Phase 3 trials.
